MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Off Calendar

Ntc And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Maureen McFadden, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Pamela Humphrey
Jennifer Svanfeldt, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: URS Corporation

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Pamela Humphrey's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories is granted, limited to complaints in California and limited to accounting departments of URS Corporation. Further response shall be made within 20 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
